  Pharmaceutical Information Portal helps 
Management Sciences for Health to improv e their  
decision making procedure related to usage of 
essential medicines & health supplies in Uganda  
 
Company Profile  
Management Sciences fo r Health (MSH) is a nonprofit international health 
organization composed of more than 2,000 people from 73 nations.  Primary 
objective and MSH’s mandate is to strengthen the national pharmaceutical 
supply chain system to ensure that Uganda’s population has access to good 
quality essential medicines and health commodities.  
 
Business Situation  
The U.S. Agency for International Development awarded MSH’s Center for 
Pharmaceutical  Management a five -year cooperative agreement to 
implement the Securing Ugandans’ Ri ght to  Essential Medicines (SURE) 
Program. SURE’s mandate is to strengthen the national  pharmaceutical 
supply chain system to ensure that Uganda’s population has access to good  
quality essential medicines and health commodities.  
 
However, in the current sc enario, decision makers at various levels of the 
medicines supply chain in Uganda lack comprehensive strategic decision 
making information and therefore have to sometimes base their decisions 
more on gut -feeling than on actual data. Major reasons for unava ilability of 
the actual data needed to help with decision making is scattered, not easily 
accessible, of questionable quality and no proper system in place to facilitate 
data analysis when required.  It has also been identified that there is a 
considerable funding gap in regards to ensuring that essential medicines & 
health supplies (EHMS) are available at all times and financial tracking of 
funding for medicines as critical for optimal use of limited funds.  
 
MSH needed a web -based system that will operate as a complete data 
collection & analysis center for providing critical information including 
details about funds allocated for essential medicines & health supplies to 
decision makers.  
 
 
  
 
 
IT Solutions                IT Products               Education &  Training               BPO / ITES  
 
 
DWH & BI based Pharmaceutical Information Portal for 
Healthcare Services Provider  

 
Copyright © 201 4 Techno Brain. All rights reserved.  
www.technobraingroup.com  Case Study  
Solution  
Techno Brain made a detailed study of the existing sys tem and requirements  and implemented Pharmaceutical 
Information Portal (PIP) – Data Warehouse & Business Intelligence System including financial & commodity tracking 
application.  
This system delivers timely  & appropriate information in a user -friendly mann er to decision makers at Central (MOH, 
NMS, JMS, NDA, IPs, Govt. Dept., Donors), District (DHO, Pharmaceutical Staff), Health Facilities and Community Level’s to 
make effective and result oriented business centric decisions.  
Data Warehouse after  import ing data from different sources , cleans, restructures and presents the accurate data through 
a web browser in various formats. BI system will enable in assessing the data sent by DWH system and take better 
decisions. This comprehensive PIP Data Warehousing & B usiness Intelligence System is designed in such a way that it can 
be integrated with the Health Information Portal (HIP ) and also handles  large volumes of information as needed by the 
users. The financial and commodity tracking system (FACTS) helps the use rs to enter financial data collected from various 
sources and is subsequently loaded into the warehouse financial data mart which enables officers to take better decisions 
and see that funds allocated on health supplies & medicines are used optimally are n ot wasted.  
Techno Brain’s team provided post implementation support to MSH and has also trained all its officials  on the usage of 
this new web based system.   
Technologies:  SQL Server 2008 R2, SQL Server BI, SharePoint 2010  
 
Benefits  
Key benefits of PIP – DWH & BI System : 
  Easy and immediate access to critical data like at all times  to decision makers at all levels  
  Timely and fast decision making enabled with accurate data availability  
  Robust system developed in such a way  to use in any environments  
  System scalable enough for use as the data needs grow  
  Data analysis performed at regular intervals  
  FACTS application enabl es decision makers to make optimal usage  of funds
